app.name: excabit
app.tagline: Graph explorer for the Bitcoin chain
search.placeholder: Paste a txid or an address and press Enter
search.label: Txid or address to explore
search.invalid: That is neither a txid (64 hex characters) nor a Bitcoin address.
network.label: Network
action.label: Label
panel.empty: Select a node to see its details.
heuristics.empty: Select a transaction to analyse it.
heuristic.change-largest-output.name: Largest output as change
heuristic.change-largest-output.descript: In a 1-input, 2-output payment with matching address types, if one output is much larger than the other, the larger one is usually the change returning to the payer.
heuristic.unnecessary-input.name: Unnecessary input
heuristic.unnecessary-input.description: With 2 inputs, if any output is smaller than the smallest input, that input was not needed for the payment: it suggests the smaller output is the payment and the rest is change.
heuristic.script-type-mismatch.name: Payment to a different script
heuristic.script-type-mismatch.descripti: If one output uses the same script type as the input and the other does not, the matching one is usually the change: wallets return the remainder to the format they use.
heuristic.taproot-payment.name: Taproot payment
heuristic.taproot-payment.description: If every input is taproot and only one output is, that output is usually the change: the payer already uses taproot and the recipient does not yet.
heuristic.format-change.name: Payment to a different format
heuristic.format-change.description: If the inputs share a type and exactly one output has a different one, that odd output is usually the payment.
heuristic.round-amount.name: Round-number payment
heuristic.round-amount.description: People pay round amounts; change is whatever is left over and rarely is. A single round output is usually the payment.
heuristic.address-reuse.name: Address reuse
heuristic.address-reuse.description: An input address reappearing as an output is change with near certainty: nobody pays themselves by accident.
heuristic.tx-version-locktime.name: Version and locktime
heuristic.tx-version-locktime.descriptio: Version, locktime and RBF usage are fingerprints of the software that built the transaction. They are only reported here: they do not point at the change.
heuristic.common-input-ownership.name: Common input ownership
heuristic.common-input-ownership.descrip: Spending several inputs requires signing with all their keys, so they usually share an owner. It does not apply to CoinJoins, where several people sign on purpose.
palette.hint: ↑↓ to navigate · Enter to run · Esc to close
shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
error.rateLimited: The provider is asking us to slow down. Retrying…
empty.title: Explore a Bitcoin transaction
empty.body: Paste a txid or try this example.
tour.step.search.title: Search a transaction
tour.step.search.body: Paste any txid here and press Enter. You can also try the example.
tour.step.expand.title: Expand the graph
tour.step.expand.body: Double-click a transaction to pull in its neighbours and follow the money.
tour.step.panel.title: Check the details
tour.step.panel.body: The side panel shows the transaction data and what its privacy heuristics reveal.
tour.step.palette.title: Everything is searchable
tour.step.palette.body: Ctrl+K opens the command palette: every action is there, with its shortcut.
tour.step.save.title: Save your investigation
tour.step.save.body: Your labels, colours and notes are saved on your own machine. There are no servers here.
persistence.nothingToExport: There is nothing to export yet.
persistence.notJson: That file is not valid JSON.
persistence.unknownVersion: That file comes from a version this app does not know (schemaVersion: {found}).
persistence.invalid: That file is not a valid investigation: {detail}
persistence.migrated: Investigation migrated from the old app.
restore.title: You have an unfinished investigation
restore.body: It was saved automatically on {date} and has {count} nodes. Do you want to pick up where you left off?
restore.corrupt: The autosave was damaged and has been discarded.
taint.nowhere: That node leads nowhere: its funds are not spent anywhere in this graph. Expand to follow the trail.
cluster.created.one: {count} wallet detected: addresses that sign together (H-09)
cluster.created.other: {count} wallets detected: addresses that sign together (H-09)
cluster.none: There are no addresses to group: that needs transactions with several known inputs. Expand the graph and try again.
cluster.ungrouped: Grouping undone. The addresses are still there.
page.more: Loaded the {loaded} most recent transactions. There are more.
